audience.terminal_user: A mainland-China Shadowrocket user who already has a proxy subscription
audience.use_scenario: Reviewing a public GitHub repository before importing a routing configuration
audience.desired_belief: Install once by remote URL, keep mainland traffic direct, choose the node manually, and receive future stable config updates through Shadowrocket
audience.next_action: Import the stable Raw URL, enable Configuration mode and background config updates, then choose a node from the home screen

consumer_value: One recommended remote-URL installation path rather than several competing choices
Mainland and local-network traffic is routed directly
Pinned ChinaMax coverage currently contains 124653 matching rules, including 112138 domain rules and 12436 IP ranges
Critical mainland chat, WSS signaling, meeting, and recording-sync domains are routed directly before the fallback
AI, developer, overseas-work, and unmatched overseas traffic follows the manually selected home-screen node
iPhone, iPad, and macOS use the same canonical configuration file
The config embeds the stable update URL and can receive updates when Shadowrocket background config updates and the required system background permission are enabled
No subscription, node, credential, HTTPS decryption, or automatic country selection is bundled
must_not_claim: Zero latency impact on every device or network
Guaranteed acceptance by every banking app
Prevention of account restrictions or platform risk controls
Guaranteed background execution or instant delivery of every update
The ChinaMax rule count equals an app count or complete coverage guarantee

community_contribution.terminal_user: A user reporting a public routing problem or proposing a public rule improvement
community_contribution.desired_action: Describe the public service and observed problem without sharing subscriptions, nodes, credentials, personal IP addresses or full logs
community_contribution.project_response: Run automated checks, complete maintainer review, and publish accepted changes through the existing stable update URL
